title: An Order Pursuant to Los Baños Local IATF Resolution No. 2021-017 Entitled: “Resolution for The Strict Implementation of Barangay Control Points in All Barangays of the Municipality of Los Baños During the Implementation of Enhanced Community Quarantine (MECQ) To Ensure That Only APOR on Essential Travels Are Allowed to Go Out of Their Residences to Regulate Entry if Non-Residents within the Barangay and to Help in The Proper Implementation of Basic Health Protocols in The Barangay”.
